basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bilaspur Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 41 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bilaspur (Himachal Pradesh)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: As per Government of India orders

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS registered with Central/State Medical Council, BDS registered with Dental Council of India
qualification.details: Junior Residents (Non-Academic) Other Departments: MBBS registered with Central/State Medical Council Junior Residents (Non-Academics) Dentistry: BDS registered with Dental Council of India

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bilaspur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Bilaspur Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Bilaspur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) posts is 22nd June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies announced by AIIMS Bilaspur?
faq.answer: AIIMS Bilaspur has announced a total of 41 vacancies for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) positions. These vacancies are distributed across different departments and dentistry.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: For Junior Residents (Non-Academic) in Other Departments, an MBBS degree registered with the Central/State Medical Council is required. For Junior Residents (Non-Academics) in Dentistry, a BDS degree registered with the Dental Council of India is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Junior Resident posts is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India orders.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) posts will receive a salary of Rs. 56,100 per month, along with usual allowances.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the AIIMS Bilaspur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official website of AIIMS Bilaspur or via the direct application link provided in the Important Links section. Ensure all details are filled correctly and documents are uploaded as per instructions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for the AIIMS Bilaspur Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is ₹1180. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) posts will involve a Written Examination, followed by an Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) positions are contractual roles at AIIMS Bilaspur.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Official Notification PDF' link provided in the Important Links section of this article.
